name: IMAC High-Imidazole Elution Buffer (500 mM)
nameCn: IMAC 高咪唑洗脱缓冲液（500 mM）

notes.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH. Used as step gradient (50→100→250→500 mM imidazole) or linear gradient on FPLC. Filter (0.22 µm) and degas before use. For step elution, 250 mM is often sufficient for most His-tagged proteins.
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 至 8.0。可用阶梯梯度 (50→100→250→500 mM imidazole) 或 FPLC 线性梯度。使用前 0.22 µm 过滤并脱气。阶梯洗脱通常 250 mM 即可洗脱大部分 His 标蛋白。

ref: QIAGEN Ni-NTA Handbook 5th ed.; Kimple et al. (2013) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 73:9.9.1
